_comment: Task-to-script mapping - helps agents find the right automation for their task
_usage: Run: .venv/bin/python scripts/find_automation.py "task description" — or --list for all

commit code.description: Stage, commit, and push with all safety checks

push code.description: Conflict-minimized push with parallel fetch, amend detection, and sync

move file.description: Move file and update all internal links automatically (870+ links preserved)

delete file.description: Delete file after checking for references

create document.description: Create document with proper metadata headers

fix broken links.description: Find and auto-fix broken internal links in markdown files

check streamlit code.description: Detect Streamlit runtime errors before they happen (fragments, session_state, imports)

run tests.description: Run Python test suite (85% coverage gate)

watch tests.description: Run tests in watch mode — re-runs on file changes

format code.description: Auto-format Python code with black + ruff

check folder structure.description: Validate project folder organization against governance rules

check governance.description: Run full governance check (folder structure + compliance)

governance health score.description: Calculate overall governance health score with breakdown

generate audit report.description: Generate audit evidence bundle (NIST SSDF aligned)

audit error handling.description: Audit error handling compliance across structural_lib modules

audit input validation.description: Audit input validation coverage for structural_lib

start session.description: Initialize agent environment — git config, venv, preflight, session start (6s)

end session.description: Validate handoff and update session docs

session summary.description: Auto-generate session summary from git log — detects new hooks, endpoints, components

sync doc numbers.description: Scan codebase metrics and update stale counts across 5 doc files

options.(no flag): Dry run — scan and report only

session handoff.description: Write next-session-brief.md for the next agent

session check.description: Verify session docs are consistent and complete

check git state.description: Validate git state before any git operation

recover git.description: Fix common git issues automatically (merge conflicts, detached HEAD, stale locks)

decide pr vs direct.description: Analyze staged changes and recommend PR vs direct commit

create pr branch.description: Start PR workflow — create task branch and initial commit

check api signatures.description: Verify API documentation matches code (signatures, docs, sync)

discover api function.description: Get exact parameter names and types for any structural_lib function

options.--filter <category>: Filter by category (design, detail, geometry, etc.)

check architecture boundaries.description: Enforce 4-layer architecture — core cannot import services/UI

check circular imports.description: Detect circular imports in the Streamlit application

check fastapi issues.description: AST-scan for common FastAPI issues (missing types, wrong patterns)

check type annotations.description: Check type annotation coverage in Streamlit application

check ui duplication.description: Scan for duplicated UI code across Streamlit pages

check performance issues.description: Detect performance anti-patterns in Streamlit application

check cost optimizer.description: Detect common cost optimizer bugs and issues

check docs.description: Unified doc checker — index, links, metadata validation

validate imports.description: Validate Python imports across the project (use after migrations)

validate api contracts.description: API contract testing — request/response schemas, status codes

validate schema snapshots.description: Validate OpenAPI schema snapshots haven't changed unexpectedly

validate streamlit session state.description: Audit st.session_state usage — uninitialized keys, missing defaults, type inconsistencies

check doc versions.description: Detect stale library version references in docs (pre-commit hook)

check tasks format.description: Validate TASKS.md structure and WIP rules

check python version.description: Enforce consistent Python version strings across configs

check version consistency.description: Verify version strings match across pyproject.toml, setup.cfg, etc.

check wip limits.description: Enforce WIP limits — max items in In Progress

check repo hygiene.description: Fail if tracked hygiene artifacts exist (pre-commit hook)

check cli reference.description: Ensure CLI reference doc includes all required commands

check scripts index.description: Ensure scripts/index.json matches actual scripts folder contents

check root file count.description: Warn if too many files in project root (sprawl detection)

check merge state.description: Check for unfinished merge before allowing commits (pre-commit hook)

check branch safety.description: Guard — prevent accidental operations on main branch

migrate python module.description: Move Python module to new location + update all imports automatically

migrate react component.description: Move React component to new feature-grouped folder + update imports

batch migration.description: Run multiple migrations with per-operation rollback logs

bump version.description: Bump version in pyproject.toml (single source of truth)

release.description: Unified release management — verify, tag, publish

benchmark api.description: API performance benchmark with latency measurements

test api parity.description: Verify library and FastAPI return identical results

test import 3d pipeline.description: End-to-end test: CSV import → beam design → 3D geometry pipeline

test vba adapter.description: Test ETABSAdapter with actual VBA ETABS export data

create test scaffold.description: Generate test file scaffold for a module

update test stats.description: Update test_stats.json with current test counts

generate folder index.description: Generate index.json + index.md for any folder (AI context files)

generate all indexes.description: Regenerate index.json + index.md for all research-relevant folders

generate docs index.description: Generate machine-readable JSON index of documentation

generate client sdks.description: Generate TypeScript/Python client SDKs from FastAPI OpenAPI spec

generate streamlit page.description: Scaffold a new Streamlit page with proper imports and patterns

launch streamlit.description: Start the Streamlit development server with proper configuration

profile streamlit page.description: Profile Streamlit page performance — render times, memory, etc.

lint vba.description: VBA syntax linting — validate before Excel import

run vba smoke tests.description: Run VBA smoke tests via Excel automation (macOS)

render dxf.description: Render DXF drawings to PNG or PDF using ezdxf + matplotlib

archive old files.description: Move files older than 90 days from docs/_active/ to _archive/

cleanup stale branches.description: Clean up stale remote branches that are already merged

collect diagnostics.description: Collect compact diagnostics bundle for debugging and support

collect metrics.description: Collect project metrics — test counts, coverage, complexity, sizes

install git hooks.description: Install versioned git hooks via core.hooksPath

local ci.description: Run CI checks locally before pushing

agent mistakes report.description: Show common agent mistakes as a reminder at session start

find automation.description: Search this automation-map to find the right script for a task

options.--category <name>: Show all tasks in a category
